meeting_title: Sierra Track Dynamics / Voxel Bi-Weekly Sync

safety_use_cases.label: Detect and reduce no-stops/rolling stops at stop signs (PIT/vehicle intersections)
safety_use_cases.description: Sierra Track Dynamics wants Voxel to accurately detect and flag vehicles/PITs that fail to make a full stop at marked intersections to address collision risk, using clean, trustworthy data with minimal false positives/misses and proper per-camera stop-bar configuration.

evidence.quote: So this is one of our areas that obviously is of most concern for many of our customers when it comes to vehicle safety and collision risk.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: And specifically with no stops here, you know, our system is designed to detect, you know, the full stop at these intersections.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: It does seem to be capturing those rolling stops, which are of concern to your team.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So, you we should be flagging those instances where vehicles are not coming to a complete stop at these stop signs.
evidence.speaker: Shawn Abbott <fake.shawn.abbott@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: the items that are either missed, the so-called no-stops that are either missed, or the things that are found that really don't appear to fit that definition, that's worrisome to me because you want good, clean data.
evidence.speaker: Carter Prescott <fake.carter.prescott@sierratrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: But, you know, so there's, you know, the inaccuracy is there as far as our concerns go.
evidence.speaker: Cameron Gardner <fake.cameron.gardner@sierratrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: With that, with the definition of a stop, you know, we have to look at each camera and its stop bar location to confirm we're within your guideline.
evidence.speaker: Cameron Gardner <fake.cameron.gardner@sierratrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: In some cases, we may not be able to put a trigger stop bar for capturing a stop if we're not in your window of that no stop positioning.
evidence.speaker: Cameron Gardner <fake.cameron.gardner@sierratrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: So there's two options we could do here is we'll pull the line back.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: But there's also a, I was talking to Kevisha about this.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: There's an adjustment we can make specifically for this camera because the pit is partially in view as, as it's entering.
evidence.speaker: Morgan Hayes <fake.morgan.hayes@voxelai.com>
